flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bennington College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.6k → $66.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bennington College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.6k → $66.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Bennington College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (66.7% vs 71.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bennington College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
